message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in signature.zig

Add comprehensive handlers for checkExprForBigIntMethodCall:
- keyword_args in call expressions
- boolop, compare expressions
- if_expr with condition, body, orelse_value
- subscript with proper slice handling
- list, tuple, dict containers
- fstring with proper part field names
- listcomp, dictcomp, genexp with generators
- lambda, starred, attribute traversal
